story:
Earlier that afternoon, the coroner, grumbling about a misplaced ring, taped a spare set of cold-room keys beneath the rail of the third body tray from the left.
That night, Willow follows a location pin Ava sent to the town morgue. White tiles. A wall of metal doors. She opens trays until she finds Ava—ice-cold, bruised, wrists chained to the rail with fat padlocks. Ava barely breathes her name. A cluttered workbench sits a few steps away under fluorescent glare. Heart racing, Willow tugs at the locks with her fingers and scans for anything she can use to free her friend.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that afternoon, the coroner, grumbling about a misplaced ring, taped a spare set of cold-room keys beneath the rail of the third body tray from the left.
question: When Willow tries to get Ava free from the padlocked chains, what will she do?
answer_with_knowledge: Reach under the third tray from the left to retrieve the taped spare keys and unlock the padlocks.
answer_without_knowledge: Grab a scalpel from the workbench and try to pick the padlocks.
